creator: changlp@cs.nctu.edu.tw
text:
Hi Ruslan,

Yes, 0.9.2 provides all functionalities django-css have, so we can
safely deprecate and remove this port.

Also thanks for your notification on the update of django_compressor,
I've submitted a update to 1.1.2 few minutes ago.

Please have a look on ports/166841

Thanks!
